member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.AvaloniaTestApp.App
member.summary: Avalonia application entry point for the test application.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.AvaloniaTestApp.App.Initialize
member.summary: Initializes the Avalonia application by loading XAML resources.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.AvaloniaTestApp.App.OnFrameworkInitializationCompleted
member.summary: Called when the framework initialization is complete. Configures debug tracing and creates the main window.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.AvaloniaTestApp.MainWindow
member.summary: Main window of the Avalonia test application hosting a terminal control and prompt box.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.AvaloniaTestApp.MainWindow.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.AvaloniaTestApp.MainWindow.InitializeComponent(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wires up the controls and optionally loads XAML markup and attaches dev tools (if Avalonia.Diagnostics package is referenced).
member.param: Should the XAML be loaded into the component.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.AvaloniaTestApp.SimpleTuiDemoSession
member.summary: Minimal demo TUI application running inside a terminal session. Shows a navigable list inside a box; the selected item can be activated with Enter.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.AvaloniaTestApp.SimpleTuiDemoSession.Render
member.summary: Renders the demo TUI, including the bordered menu, selection highlight, and status bar.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.AvaloniaTestApp.SimpleTuiDemoSession.OnKey(System.ConsoleKey)
member.summary: Handles keyboard input to navigate the menu or activate the selected item.
